limitations: Popularity is a proxy, not actual sales, traffic, or conversion data.
Value is a category-relative heuristic using price, material keywords, markdowns, and availability.
The export is a bounded public catalog sample, not the complete KHAITE catalog.

Crafted in Italy of 18-karat-gold-plated brass, each cast link is composed of three parts, with subtle variations that enhance the organic quality of the piece. Integrated hook closure.
products.proxy_score_notes: Heuristic only: popularity uses best-seller/new/sale tags, collection presence, variant scarcity, image count, and availability. It is not actual sales or traffic.

products.title: Keefe Belt in Black Leather with Gold
products.description: A sculptural domed buckle is the centerpiece of this bold belt in soft and supple calfskin that molds beautifully to the body. The jewelry-grade hardware is crafted in Italy of 18-karat-gold-plated brass.

products.title: Keefe Earrings in Gold
products.description: At once sculptural and organic, these earrings are crafted of brass plated in 18-karat gold and polished to a fine gleam, accentuating the smoothly rounded, gently elongated forms. Sold as a pair.
